releases.summary: Add transparent adaptive-experience primitives to the personalization library.

audiences.summary: Personalization now separates interaction preferences, behavior support strategy, behavior evidence, and runtime adaptive decisions into additive public contracts.
Apps can recommend editable interaction and behavior support presets, represent behavior signals as scoped evidence, and resolve runtime-only adaptive actions bounded by permissions and policy.
Adaptive experiences can explain what changed, why it changed, and how users can override or undo the change.

upgradeSteps.title: Use adaptive experience primitives for transparent personalization
upgradeSteps.summary: Layer behavior support and evidence-based suggestions on top of existing PreferenceDimensions without replacing authorization or business rules.
instructions: Use `BehaviorSupportDimensions` for action, recovery, reflection, and accountability support.
Represent observed behavior with `BehaviorSignalModel` and user-facing reasons.
Resolve `ResolvedAdaptiveExperience` at runtime instead of storing it as a hidden profile.

evidence: Personalization tests cover behavior support presets, adaptive onboarding, behavior signal safety, runtime resolution, scoped evolution, DataView preferences, and authorization suppression.
Typecheck and lint validate the additive public API surface.

releases.summary: Add provider delta contracts, Google Drive knowledge ingestion, and governed mutation execution for workspace knowledge.

audiences.summary: Maintainers get shared delta sync contracts and package-local tests for Gmail/Drive ingestion and governed mutations.
Integrators can model provider leases, cursors, webhook expiry, dedupe/idempotency, replay checkpoints, tombstones, Drive files, and governed outbound mutations before wiring runtime sync.

upgradeSteps.title: Attach delta state before runtime sync
upgradeSteps.summary: Use `ProviderDeltaSyncState` for provider cursors, leases, webhook expiry, dedupe, idempotency, replay, and tombstone state.
instructions: Pass provider cursor or watermark state into Gmail and Drive sync calls.
Persist returned delta state before acknowledging runtime sync work.
Skip or delete records marked with tombstones before re-indexing.

upgradeSteps.title: Gate knowledge mutations before provider writes
upgradeSteps.summary: Wrap external writes with `executeGovernedKnowledgeMutation(...)` so dry-runs, approvals, idempotency, audit evidence, and outbound-send gates are explicit.
instructions: Require approval refs and an approved outbound-send gate before sending external messages.

commands: cd packages/libs/knowledge && bun run test && bun run typecheck && bun run lint:check
cd packages/libs/contracts-integrations && bun run typecheck && bun run lint:check
cd packages/libs/contracts-spec && bun run test src/knowledge/operations.test.ts && bun run typecheck && bun run lint:check
cd packages/bundles/library && bun run typecheck && bun run lint:check
cd packages/bundles/marketing && bun run typecheck && bun run lint:check
cd packages/apps/web-landing && bun run build:types && bun run lint:check
bun run docs:generate && bun run release:build
evidence: `ProviderDeltaSyncState` models lease holder/expiry, renewal windows, cursors/watermark versions, webhook expiry, provider event IDs, dedupe/idempotency, replay checkpoints, and tombstones.
`googleDriveIntegrationSpec` registers `storage.google-drive` with Drive ingestion and provider delta watch capabilities.
`KnowledgeRuntime.syncGmail()`, `KnowledgeRuntime.syncDriveFiles()`, and `KnowledgeRuntime.watchDriveChanges()` load and save checkpoint deltas before acknowledging sync work.
`knowledge.mutation.evaluateGovernance` exposes mutation governance as a ContractSpec operation for Connect, ops, and review packets.
`executeGovernedKnowledgeMutation()` blocks missing evidence, preserves dry-runs, gates outbound sends behind approvals, and returns an audit envelope.
Web docs include the provider-backed knowledge guide, Google Drive integration page, knowledge governance page, docblock entry, generated docs, release artifacts, and `/llms*` outputs.
